title: Ethereum Smart Contracts: Decentralized Applications
author: Phoenix Taylor
Blockchain Developer
description: Deploy Solidity smart contracts—but reentrancy bugs drain wallets
content:
Smart contracts enable trustless execution on the blockchain.
